package rulecoverage

func PositiveHttpClientWithoutTimeout() string {
    ruleID := "http_client_without_timeout"
    family := "idioms"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Local http.Client{} literals constructed without an explicit timeout."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
